adminMessage.title: Office Notice
adminMessage.text: Please note: office hours may change during festival periods. Check local announcements.

greetings.title: Eid Mubarak
greetings.text: Eid Mubarak to everyone in Jammu & Kashmir. May peace and joy be with you.

seed_sighting.note: Shaban was 29 days and completed on 18-Feb-2026; 19-Feb-2026 is 1 Ramadan (seed).
